subcodes.first_line: O ye friends and handmaidens of the All-Merciful! Two souls enamoured of divine love, Haji Khan and Khan Baba, have penned a letter [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران و اماء رحمن دو مفتون محبت الهی حاجی خان و خان بابا نامه ای نگاشتند و
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @self-improvement; self-perfection; discipline
